title: Sully Baez - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Sully Baez - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All People
Sully Baez

Assistant Dean of Research and Finance
Education
Education
MA in Business Administration, Northeastern University

Biography
Biography
Sully Baez is the assistant dean of research and finance at the Khoury College of Computer Sciences at Northeastern University. She received her master’s and bachelor’s in business administration from Northeastern. Baez joined Northeastern’s School of Law in 2009 and worked in financial roles before joining Khoury College.
In her current role, Baez works with the overall budget, including the different funds —whether operating, designated, or restricted — and some gifts. She works with logistics for these accounts, which she finds interesting because they are very different.
Baez is excited about the work conducted at Khoury College because she sees how computer science is in high demand and touches everything. She enjoys the organizational culture and working with her colleagues.
